title: Five people in Taguatinga-DF observed a stationary three-pointed UFO for 2 hours [1996]

text_preview: JAN 14th, 1996. Time: 18h45. Duration: 2 hours. When they were close to their homes in Taguatinga Norte, in the Federal District, five people observed two unidentified flying objects at an altitude of about 3,000 meters. According to the report informed to COMDABRA [Brazilian Aerospace Defense Command], the witnesses “were out and saw a huge motionless star; then they saw another object that moved with great speed”. One of the UFOs, according to the description made, was shaped like a white “three-pointed star”, resembling a ‘searchlight in the sky’ and remained stationary during the sighting.
summary: Five witnesses in Taguatinga Norte-DF observed a stationary white three-pointed star-shaped UFO and a second fast-moving object for 2 hours on Jan 14, 1996.
